source_prompt_set: fixed COCO validation prompts used in the current VKR figure

prompts.caption: A group of people gathered to celebrate a birthday.
Black birds on a wood fence near the ocean.
Pizza with toppings baking in oven with steel
A man riding on the back of a motorcycle with a woman.
Two giraffes standing together in an open field zoo den
Two people on mopeds passing in front of a building.
A blue boat docked on a green lush shore.
A man throwing a baseball while people watch from chairs behind him.
a baseball player is going to swing a bat
A person standing on a street with some food.
A close up of a plate of pasta containing broccoli.
a close up of a dog with a hat
A clock sitting in the middle of the city, in front of a building.
A man looking down with a backpack on in a house.
An elephant walks next to a bus down a busy street.
A crow approaches a cardboard pizza box on the ground and opens it
